content.fact_text: OrderRepository implemented with Knex for PostgreSQL, featuring transactional state management, circuit breaking via Opossum, and structured Pino logging with PII redaction.

provenance_data.behaviour: Provides an ACID-compliant repository for persistent order management using Knex, with integrated circuit breaking, structured logging, and PII redaction. Ensures transactional integrity for state mutations.
provenance_data.utility: Provides robust, ACID-compliant database access for the Order Service, ensuring data integrity and observability.
